Name: GATA HUB
Networks validating: AtomOne, CosmosHub, Akash, Namada, Osmosis, Stargaze, Passage, Juno, Nomic.
AuM: M

Digital presence: 
Website: https://gatahub.zone
X(Twitter): https://x.com/GataHubZone
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/4MCrtaCetp

Contact: 
Discord ID: wassieofgata
Telegram: JoveCosmos
Email: support@gatahub.zone

Why gno.land: 
We�ve built our DAO and infrastructure across multiple Cosmos SDK chains, and we see Gno.land as a natural evolution of that journey. We view Gno.land as the future home for our DAO.
Its open, transparent, and community-driven on-chain design aligns strongly with our vision - one that GATA already champions through real-world community engagement.

Contribution:
GATA Hub and Gno.land began their journeys around the same time. From early experimentation to active participation in multiple testnets, our team has consistently engaged with and contributed to its evolution.
We are committed to providing reliable infrastructure for Gno.land, supporting DAO tooling, and contributing to the growth of its ecosystem.
